channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rethinking Global Shipping: The Growing Importance of the Cape Sea Route
item.description: Recent events in the Middle East during February and March 2026 have once again disrupted global shipping flows, highlighting the vulnerability of maritime trade which forms the backbone of the global...

item.title: Camilla Araújo: From Squid Game Participant to Social Media Influencer
item.description: Camilla Araújo is an American-Brazilian model and social media influencer who gained major attention in 2021 when she played Player 067 in MrBeast's real-life version of Squid Game. Born on 1 May 2002...

item.title: Albertans show strong support for limiting health care access for temporary immigrants
item.description: A recent Postmedia-Leger poll indicates that a majority of Albertans back Premier Danielle Smith’s proposals regarding immigration and public services. Specifically, 63 per cent support limiting acces...

item.title: Donald Trump’s 2024 campaign promises and subsequent policy reversals
item.description: During his 2024 election campaign, Donald Trump repeatedly presented himself as a candidate committed to peace, explicitly claiming at a rally in Michigan that he was 'the candidate of peace' and even...

item.title: Social Cohesion Still South Africa's Key Challenge After 30 Years of Democracy
item.description: As South Africa marks 30 years since the adoption of its democratic Constitution, the nation stands at a critical juncture. The Constitution was more than just a legal document; it embodied a moral co...

item.title: Oil Prices Drop 7% After Trump Signals Quick End to Middle East Conflict
item.description: Oil prices experienced a sharp decline of around 7 per cent on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, after reaching a more than three-year high above $119 per barrel the previous day. The drop came following state...

item.title: AI Cancer Screening in the NHS: Promise and Practical Barriers
item.description: A new joint study by Google, the NHS, and Imperial College London shows that artificial intelligence (AI) can detect breast cancer with accuracy comparable to that of human radiologists, while process...

item.title: Parliament Urged to Address Haemophilia Treatment Gaps in Kenya
item.description: A petition presented in the National Assembly by James Kago, treasurer of the Kenya Haemophilia Association, has raised serious concerns over the state of haemophilia treatment in Kenya. The petition ...

item.title: REI Offers 50% Off Its In-House Co-op Jackets for Limited Time
item.description: REI is offering a limited-time 50% discount on its in-house Co-op jackets for both men and women, providing an excellent opportunity for outdoor enthusiasts to purchase durable, versatile, and fairly ...

item.title: The Importance of Early Detection in Inflammatory Arthritis and First Contact Physiotherapists' Role
item.description: Inflammatory arthritis is an immune-driven condition that can severely damage joints and other organs if not treated promptly. Unlike osteoarthritis, which is linked to ageing and gradual wear, inflam...

item.title: Impact of Middle East Tensions on LPG Prices in India
item.description: The ongoing tensions between Iran and the United States in the Middle East are having a direct impact on global energy markets, which is being felt in India through rising LPG prices. India imports a ...

item.title: Netizens recall Hidilyn Diaz's lifetime fuel incentive as oil prices surge

item.title: Boeing Shifts Focus to Defense Amid Civil Aviation Challenges

item.title: Venezuelan Activist Lilian Tintori Discusses Resilience Amid Political Persecution
item.description: Venezuelan democracy activist Lilian Tintori, along with her husband Leopoldo Lopez, has faced ongoing political persecution despite the reported capture of President Maduro by U.S. forces. Tintori ex...

item.title: CTV News observes Ottawa commuters’ daily OC Transpo routines
item.description: CTV News followed Ottawa residents during their daily commute on OC Transpo, highlighting the complex decisions commuters face every morning. From choosing the fastest bus route to balancing transfers...

item.title: Multiple fatalities and injuries in Swiss bus fire in Kerzers
item.description: A tragic incident occurred on Tuesday evening in the town of Kerzers, western Switzerland, when a coach carrying passengers caught fire around 6:25pm. According to police reports, the blaze was allege...

item.title: Economic and Political Beneficiaries of the Iran Conflict
item.description: The recent airstrikes on Iran by US and Israeli forces have sent shockwaves through global markets, with immediate and far-reaching economic consequences. The UK faces particular challenges, as GDP gr...

item.title: Government Announces Sh2 Billion Compensation for Protest Victims and Establishes Coalition Taskforce
item.description: President William Ruto has announced a Sh2 billion fund to compensate victims of police brutality during protests and riots in Kenya. This comes as he and former Vice President Kalonzo Musyoka's ally ...
